headline: Expedia, Newmont, and 7 More Stocks That Look Good—Whatever the Market Does
summary: The index’s advance is driven by an almost 35% rise this year for the  The companies in that ETF have benefited from undying chip demand from the big internet and software companies that are building data centers.  Also, the  is up more than 10%, driven by several manufacturers that supply products for data centers.  The reason: the data center-exposed stocks are vulnerable to steep declines if one of the large internet or software companies signals it will slow down the growth of its investments in data centers.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Expedia Group (EXPE) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Expedia Group's share price still offers value after a strong run, it helps to separate short term excitement from what the fundamentals may justify. The stock last closed at US$250.57, with returns of 0.1% over 7 days, 8.5% over 30 days, 59.9% over 1 year and 183.9% over 3 years. However, the year to date return reflects an 11.4% decline and the 5 year return is 53.6%. Recent headlines around online travel platforms have kept attention on how consumer travel...

headline: EXPEDIA GROUP INC (NASDAQ:EXPE) – A Decent Value Play with Strong Fundamentals
summary: Expedia Group (EXPE) offers strong value with a low P/E of 15.67, high profitability scores, and consistent growth. This global travel giant trades below intrinsic worth, making it a compelling value stock for disciplined investors.

headline: Uber Expands Into Hotels With Expedia Deal And Wider Upside Story
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is adding in-app hotel booking through a new partnership with Expedia. The tie up opens access to more than 700,000 hotels directly inside the Uber app. Features include planned vacation rental integration, curated trip tools, and AI powered booking assistance. Uber Technologies, trading at $74.47, is extending its reach beyond rides and food delivery by folding hotel reservations into its core app. The company’s 3 year return is about 7x, while the 5 year...
